title: senecio spelaeicola
intro: Senecio spelaeicola, also known as cave ragwort or mountain ragwort, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. Its health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe skin irritations. In herbal preparations, Senecio spelaeicola is often used to make teas, infusions, and ointments, which can be used to treat wounds, colds, and other minor ailments.
